basic_info.title: Xenoblade Chronicles 2
basic_info.review: A visually stunning and ambitious RPG that refines the Xenoblade formula with a unique Blade system, though its combat can feel repetitive over its massive length.

similar_games.title: Dragon Quest XI: Echoes of an Elusive Age
The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild

play_today.details: The complete experience with all DLC including Torna - The Golden Country prequel story, additional blades, side quests, and challenge mode. Best played on docked mode for optimal visuals.

recommended_patches.name: Ultimate XC2 Rebalance Mod
recommended_patches.description: Comprehensive combat rebalance that improves shield hammers and other underperforming classes. Version 1.8 is the latest stable release.

recommended_patches.name: Reduced Tedium Mod
recommended_patches.description: Quality of life improvements including faster traversal, improved UI elements, and reduced grinding requirements.

optimal_settings: Enable VSync for stable frame rate

play_today.details: The original release without DLC content. Still offers the full main story experience but lacks Torna prequel and additional blades.

optimal_settings: Enable VSync for stable frame rate

play_today.platform: Nintendo Switch (Torna - The Golden Country Standalone)
play_today.details: Standalone prequel story set 500 years before the main game. Features refined combat system and new characters. Requires base game for full DLC access.

optimal_settings: Enable VSync for stable frame rate

play_today.details: The Japanese release of the Definitive Edition. While it offers the same core gameplay and English localization as other regions, it is primarily recommended for collectors or players who prefer the Japanese eShop ecosystem. It lacks any unique gameplay features compared to the global versions but remains a valid way to experience the game on modern hardware.

recommended_patches.name: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition - Quality of Life Tweaks
recommended_patches.description: A collection of tweaks for the Nintendo Switch version of Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition that improves UI responsiveness and adds minor quality-of-life improvements for exploration.

recommended_patches.name: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition - Switch Port Mods
recommended_patches.description: A repository of mods specifically designed for the Nintendo Switch version of Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition, focusing on graphical enhancements and gameplay tweaks.

recommended_patches.name: FPSLocker Overlay
recommended_patches.description: An overlay tool compatible with the Nintendo Switch (via custom firmware) that allows users to set custom display refresh rates and FPS limits for retail games like Xenoblade Chronicles X.

description.synopsis: In a world where humanity lives atop the backs of colossal Titans, a young scavenger named Rex discovers a legendary Blade named Pyra. Together, they join a group of adventurers to challenge the Alrest Empire and uncover the truth behind the Titans and the mysterious 'Aegis' prophecy.
key_features: Blade summoning system allowing players to equip and swap humanoid weapons
Chain Attack mechanic combining Arts and Blade abilities for massive damage
Open-world exploration across massive floating islands and ruins
Real-time action combat with manual dodging and blocking
Deep character customization through the Arts and Blade affinity system
Extensive side quests and exploration rewards
Dynamic weather and day-night cycles affecting gameplay
Co-op multiplayer support for specific quests
Complex narrative branching based on player choices
High-fidelity graphics and orchestral soundtrack by Yasunori Mitsuda
legacy_and_impact: Xenoblade Chronicles 2 revitalized the Nintendo Switch library upon launch, proving the console's capability for high-fidelity JRPGs. It established a new sub-series with the Blade mechanic and set a high bar for open-world design on handheld consoles.
